issues.display_title: Issue #1681: refactor(careers): restyle careers page to new design system
issues.main_description_html:
Description

Restyle the careers page to match the new design system used across other pages (not-found, contact, reset-password).

Changes

HTML - careers.component.html

  • Replace old wrapper/carreer markup with new villume-careers scoped layout
  • Add hero-grid + hero-bg backdrop elements
  • Add reveal.in entrance animation wrapper
  • Replace icon font with inline SVG icons
  • Add eyebrow label, briefcase icon, and expanded copy
  • Add two-button action row: Go back primary + Contact us outline linking to /contact

SCSS - careers.component.scss

  • Replace old SCSS variables with CSS custom property design tokens
  • Use confirm full-viewport centered grid layout
  • Port hero-grid, hero-bg, btn, eyebrow, lede, reveal styles from not-found page pattern
  • Responsive via clamp instead of hardcoded breakpoint padding

TypeScript - careers.component.ts

  • Add RouterLink import for the new /contact link

References

  • Follows same pattern as not-found.component and contact.component
  • Uses design tokens from _design-tokens.scss

Demo by Developer

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1681: Restyle Careers Page To New Design System

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/careers/issue_1681_careers_new_design.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium) and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1681-dev-flow.cjs (Chrome headed/maximized - FFmpeg desktop recording)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Account: Not required.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Black open_careers GET /careers -> careers page responds and renders TP Pass
2 White confirm_layout careers page -> .villume-careers, .confirm, .confirm-inner, centered grid layout TP Pass
3 White visual_system careers page -> hero grid/bg, reveal.in, eyebrow, inline SVG icon, no icon font TP Pass
4 Black content_actions careers page -> expanded copy, Go back, Contact us linking to /contact TP Pass
5 Black contact_navigation click Contact us -> navigates to /contact TP Pass
6 Black responsive_dark careers page remains usable in mobile dark mode without horizontal overflow Mobile + dark Pass
7 Task Sprint #1681 acceptance new design system, light/dark, responsive, contact action, inline SVGs TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
Scoped layout villume-careers Rendered on dev Pass
Confirm layout Full-viewport centered .confirm grid Rendered and CSS display is grid Pass
Backdrop hero-grid + hero-bg Both render Pass
Entrance wrapper reveal.in Rendered Pass
Eyebrow Careers label Rendered as Careers Pass
Briefcase icon Inline SVG icon, not icon font Inline SVG renders; old i.vi count is zero Pass
Copy Expanded hiring status copy Rendered: no open positions, check back soon Pass
Actions Go back primary + Contact us outline Both render Pass
Contact route Contact us links to /contact Link navigates successfully Pass
Responsive/dark Desktop/mobile light/dark Verified with screenshots and no horizontal overflow Pass

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/careers 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 Careers route loads successfully on dev.
GET https://dev.villume.com/contact 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 Contact route loads after clicking the Contact us action.

Code / DOM Review

Area Review
Careers root Dev runtime DOM contains .villume-careers, matching the scoped layout requirement.
Confirm family Dev runtime DOM contains .confirm and .confirm-inner, matching the not-found/contact design pattern.
Visual backdrop Dev runtime DOM contains .hero-grid and .hero-bg.
Icon system Dev runtime DOM contains three inline SVGs and zero old i.vi icon-font nodes inside .villume-careers.
Actions Dev runtime DOM contains Go back and an anchor with href="/contact".
Responsive guard Playwright mobile viewport check confirmed no horizontal document overflow.

Desktop dark qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1681-careers-desktop-dark.png
Mobile light qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1681-careers-mobile-light.png
Mobile dark qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1681-careers-mobile-dark.png
Address-bar video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1681-careers-address-bar.mp4

Bug Notes

  • No blocking issue found for #1681 on https://dev.villume.com/careers.
  • Visual evidence is captured from the dev careers route; the video is a desktop recording with the browser address bar visible.
